     The Numbers Business Report

After We Collided (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $2,386,483Details
International Box Office $40,919,909
Worldwide Box Office $43,306,392
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Hardin will always be… Hardin. But is he really the deep, thoughtful guy Tessa fell madly in love with — or has he been a stranger all along? She wishes she could walk away. It’s just not that easy. Not with the memory of the passionate nights they spent together. Still, Tessa’s not sure she can endure one more broken promise. She’s focused on her studies and just starting an exciting new internship at Vance Publishing. She's also being pursued by Trevor, a handsome new co-worker who is exactly the kind of guy she should be with. Hardin knows he made a mistake, possibly the biggest one of his life. He wants to right his wrongs and overcome his demons. He’s not going to lose Tessa without a fight. But can he change? Will he change… for love?

Metrics

Legs:5.64 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:5.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $3,109,181

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 11th, 2020 (Limited) (Canada)
October 23rd, 2020 (Limited) by Open Road
International Releases: September 2nd, 2020 (Wide), released as After 2 (Italy)
September 3rd, 2020 (Limited), released as After Truth (Germany)
September 3rd, 2020 (Wide), released as After - Depois da Verdade (Portugal)
September 4th, 2020 (Wide), released as After. En mil pedazos (Spain)
September 4th, 2020 (Wide) (Austria)
Video Release: October 23rd, 2020 by Open Road Films
MPA Rating: R for sexual content, language throughout and some drug material.
(Rating bulletin 2649 (cert#52869), 9/30/2020)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Franchise: After
Plot point: Love Triangle, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Social setting: College, Internships, Publishing Industry
Source material: Young Adult Book Adaptation
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Voltage Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Hardin will always be… Hardin. But is he really the deep, thoughtful guy Tessa fell madly in love with — or has he been a stranger all along? She wishes she could walk away. It’s just not that easy. Not with the memory of the passionate nights they spent together. Still, Tessa’s not sure she can endure one more broken promise. She’s focused on her studies and just starting an exciting new internship at Vance Publishing. She's also being pursued by Trevor, a handsome new co-worker who is exactly the kind of guy she should be with. Hardin knows he made a mistake, possibly the biggest one of his life. He wants to right his wrongs and overcome his demons. He’s not going to lose Tessa without a fight. But can he change? Will he change… for love?
